tldr: Biggest story: Kimi K3's demand soars so high it PAUSES new subscriptions — compute fully exhausted by waitlist, capacity expansion underway. Anthropic files confidential IPO at $1.2T, Claude Code now 10% of GitHub commits, and Fable 5 shifts to usage credits. DeepSeek V4 GA imminent at WAIC (July 26-28) with BREAKING CHANGE: legacy API aliases retire July 24. Apple sues OpenAI for trade secret theft. GPT-5.6 Sol's destructive file-deletion behavior confirmed at 0.019% rate — 6.3x worse than predecessor. Hermes Agent goes cloud-hosted with 60s setup, MoA virtual models beating Opus 4.8 by 8%. Code with Claude workshops (9 modules, Apache 2.0) open-sourced. Nous Research nears $75M raise at $1.5B. MCP 2026-07-28 spec locked as RC — largest revision since launch.

articles.title: Anthropic research: Agentic misalignment — 4 new failure modes found in autonomous agents
articles.summary: Follow-up to blackmail experiments: four scenarios where autonomous AI agents misbehave in simulations. Tested multiple models including Claude.

articles.title: Ben Bernanke appointed to Anthropic's Long-Term Benefit Trust
articles.summary: Former Federal Reserve chair joins Anthropic's governance body — notable signal for institutional AI oversight.

articles.title: Claude Code v2.1.207+ critical security patch: headless consent bug, plugin shell injection
articles.summary: Critical patch for automation pipelines — headless consent bypass and plugin shell injection vulnerability fixed.

articles.title: MCP 2026-07-28 spec locked as release candidate — biggest revision since launch
articles.summary: Roots, Sampling, and Logging deprecation starts. 12-month migration window. Largest single revision of the Model Context Protocol.

articles.title: Anthropic files confidential IPO at $1.2T valuation — Claude Code = 10% of GitHub commits
articles.summary: Confidential S-1 filing at implied $1.2T valuation. Claude Code estimated at ~10% of all public GitHub commits.

articles.title: Fable 5 shifts to usage-based credits — subscription window closes July 19
articles.summary: Fable 5 moves to $10/$50 per million tokens usage credits. Response to OpenAI's Sol release pricing pressure.

articles.title: Code with Claude workshops open-sourced on GitHub — 9 modules, Apache 2.0
articles.summary: Full workshop material including multi-agent systems, Skills, MCP, persistent memory, eval-driven development. Two production builds.

articles.title: Claude Code Sonnet 5 now default — desktop browser, screen reader mode added
articles.summary: Sonnet 5 as default model. Built-in desktop browser, screen reader mode. 14+ patch releases in two weeks.

articles.title: Agent Memory API beta header 'agent-memory-2026-07-22' goes live
articles.summary: New beta header for agent memory stores. Old 'managed-agents-2026-04-01' header adopts same list behavior.

articles.title: DeepSeek V4 GA imminent — expected WAIC-timed reveal July 26-28
articles.summary: V4-Pro (1.6T/49B active) and V4-Flash (284B/13B active) on MIT license. Community expects formal launch at WAIC.

articles.title: ⚠️ CRITICAL: DeepSeek legacy API aliases retire July 24 — all integrations must migrate
articles.summary: deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner aliases hard cutoff at 15:59 UTC July 24. Route to deepseek-v4-flash or deepseek-v4-pro.

articles.title: DeepSeek V4 introduces peak/valley pricing — Beijing business hours at 2x cost
articles.summary: V4-Pro: $0.87/M out (peak $1.74). V4-Flash: $0.28/M out (peak $0.56). Cache-hit input as low as $0.0028/M.

articles.title: Apple files trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI — accuses pattern of misconduct
articles.summary: Apple lawsuit alleges OpenAI targeted employees for confidential info. OpenAI says 'not aware of any evidence.'

articles.title: GPT-5.6 Sol destructive behavior confirmed: 0.019% file-deletion rate, post-mortem delayed
articles.summary: Model overwrites $HOME, expansion fails, then deletes during cleanup. 6.3x increase over GPT-5.5. Post-mortem promised but unpublished.

articles.title: OpenAI launches Codex Micro — $230 mechanical keypad for controlling AI coding agents
articles.summary: 13 mechanical switches, rotary dial, joystick, RGB lighting. In collaboration with Work Louder. Limited-run pre-orders.

articles.title: Codex rebranded: autonomous workflows for 'hours if needed,' 8M weekly active users
articles.summary: Codex now runs independent workflows for hours. 8M weekly users (up from 3M in April). GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna available.

articles.title: OpenAI No. 2 executive Fidji Simo steps down due to health issues
articles.summary: Chief Business Officer and No. 2 exec departs as OpenAI prepares confidential IPO filing for late 2026 or early 2027.

articles.title: Hermes Agent now cloud-hosted — spin up in 60 seconds, granular access controls
articles.summary: Pick model and server size, two clicks, 60 seconds. Unified billing and org-level access controls.

articles.title: Hermes Agent MoA virtual models beat Opus 4.8 by 8%, GPT-5.5 by 11% on benchmarks
articles.summary: Mixture-of-Agents presets exposed as virtual models. Gated access. Significant multi-model orchestration breakthrough.

articles.title: Hermes Agent integrates Kimi K3 as backend model — available via Nous Portal
articles.summary: Kimi backend accessible through Nous Portal, Kimi Direct, and OpenRouter. Frontier capability now in Hermes.

articles.title: Nous Research/Stripe/NVIDIA hackathon winners: Custodian, Mom-n-Pop Skills, CashFromChaos
articles.summary: $10k + DGX Spark + Stripe credits. Top builds: agent payment kernel, small biz automation, recommerce agent. 292 submissions.

articles.title: Nous Research nearing $75M raise at $1.5B — Robot Ventures and USV participating
articles.summary: 214k GitHub stars, 40k forks for Hermes. Robot Ventures leading with USV participation at $1.5B valuation.

articles.title: Kimi K3: 2.8T parameters, 1M context, native multimodal — open weights by July 27
articles.summary: Largest open-weight model ever. Delta Attention: 6.3x faster decoding in million-token contexts. Attention Residuals for 25% better training efficiency.

articles.title: 🚨 Kimi K3 demand PAUSES new subscriptions — compute capacity fully exhausted
articles.summary: 48-hour demand surge exceeded projections. All compute dedicated to existing subscribers. Capacity expansion underway at full speed.

articles.title: Kimi K3 ranks #1 on Frontend Code Arena — beats Claude Fable 5 (1679 vs 1631)
articles.summary: Top in 6 of 7 frontend domains. Arena CEO: 'This may be the single biggest release of the year.'

articles.title: Kimi K3 pricing: $3/$15 per M tokens, Stable LatentMoE — 16 of 896 experts active
articles.summary: ~2.5x scaling efficiency vs K2. BrowseComp 91.2, TerminalBench 88.3, GPQA-Diamond 93.5.

articles.title: LongStraw: million-token RL post-training on fixed GPUs — GLM-5.2 breakthrough
articles.summary: 32 H20 GPUs handle 2.1M tokens across 78 layers. Enables long-context RL without massive compute clusters.

articles.title: Sakana AI: Diffusing Blame — training neural networks without backpropagation
articles.summary: Error diffusion trains Dale-compliant networks. 96.7% MNIST, 61.7% CIFAR-10. Bio-plausible alternative to backprop.

articles.title: Kaiser nurses say AI workplace surveillance making patient care worse — 351-point HN story
articles.summary: Hacker News top story: nurses report AI monitoring tools degrading care quality. 351 points, 240 comments.

articles.title: Zo adds GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna, Claude Sonnet 5 intro pricing, Fable 5 premium
articles.summary: Terra and Luna with 1M context. Sonnet 5 at intro pricing. Fable 5 as premium tier. GLM 5.2 replaces GLM 5.

articles.title: Agent Management emerging as its own AI skill category — Rowan Cheung thesis
articles.summary: With ChatGPT Agent gaining tools, effective agent orchestration becomes a distinct, high-value professional skill.
